item.name: Pack Faehound Whistle
item.description: A metallic tube-like whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone only discernable by a faehound raised and trained in captivity. Use to summon your pack faehound mount.

mount.name: Pack Faehound
mount.action: Summon forth your pack faehound, void-spawned aberration loyal to none save you and yours.
mount.description: Covered from muzzle to tail in an otherworldly silver coat, the faehound appears more akin to something out of a faerie tale than from the nether-reaches of the void. Yet do not be fooled by the beast's appearance, for she is an equal in strength to all but the highest ranking voidsent, her heart swollen with savagery from a lifetime leading a pack of her own.
mount.tooltip:
Are you inclined to
think them faerie tales?
- Alberic
